issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
Skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed.
Skill is vendor-locked to Anthropic's Claude API.
Code executes arbitrary bash commands via subprocess.run with shell=True, which can be dangerous if not sandboxed.
Pip packages are installed without checksum verification, potentially allowing tampered packages.

scenarios.name: legacy-web-form-fill
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required screenshot and tool_use blocks, so neither meets the rubric.

scenarios.name: desktop-app-data-extraction
scenarios.rationale: Both responses omit the required screenshot, computer tool_use with mouse_move, type, and bash blocks, so neither meets the rubric.
